name: Braided Water Hyacinth Tapered Floor Basket Sleepy Bear - Cloud Island™
description:
Store their belongings in functional style while keeping them easily accessible with this Braided Water Hyacinth Tapered Floor Sleepy Bear Basket from cloud island™. Made from water hyacinth material for a charming natural look and texture, this braided tapered decorative basket offers ample space for their bath items, toys and more. It features an illustration of an adorable sleepy bear on the front with ears for a fun look they'll love, and comes in a natural hue for easily mixing with a range of decor styles. Simply add other braided storage bins to create a coordinated look while giving their room extra storage space.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
